task_completion.description: Navigate to the Quality Control Points list in the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Quality app is open, displaying a list or kanban view of Quality Control Points.

task_completion.description: Open the specific Quality Control Point named 'Visual Inspection - Incoming Screens'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The detail/form view of the Quality Control Point titled 'Visual Inspection - Incoming Screens' is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Modify the product field to remove the old product and add the new one.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Product' or 'Products' field is actively being edited. 'Acoustic Bloc Screens' is removed and/or 'Office Chair' is being typed or selected from a dropdown.

task_completion.description: Save the Quality Control Point with the new product assigned.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QCP form is in a saved state (or shows no unsaved changes) with 'Office Chair' clearly visible in the Product field.

task_completion.description: Ensure the QCP name and test type were not modified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the final saved state, the title of the QCP remains exactly 'Visual Inspection - Incoming Screens' and the 'Test Type' field is populated and unchanged from its original state.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Odoo graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show standard web browser interaction with the Odoo UI, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely modified the record within the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual Odoo form fields being clicked and edited, rather than text being typed into a separate text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual state.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) are not open in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target Quality Control Point (QCP) is named 'Visual Inspection - Incoming Screens'. The agent must change its associated product from 'Acoustic Bloc Screens' to 'Office Chair'. The QCP name and its test type must remain completely unchanged.
